name: Gammon (Ham) Steaks with Whiskey Sauce (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the steaks with melted butter.
2. Snip the fat to prevent curling, and grill for 7-8 minutes on each side.
- To make the sauce: Gently fry onions in the remaining butter until cooked.
- Remove from heat and stir in flour gradually.
- Add stock. Return to heat.
- Add sugar and bring to a boil.
- Simmer gently for about 2 minutes to cook the flour.
- If the sauce seems a little thick, add more water.
- Add whiskey and season to taste.
3. Place gammon steaks on a warmed serving platter and pour on sauce.
4. Serve with peas and carrots, or sauteed potatoes.
